rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §43.054, which governs employment of a corporation's chief executive officer.
quote: Sec. 43.054. CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER. (a) The corporation shall employ a chief executive officer to manage and carry out the policies of the corporation.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and rule text.
